title: Herobrine Iron Door w/ Sounds
description: Changes the Iron Door texture and sounds into Herobrine and a few cave noises.
body:
This resource pack changes the Iron Door texture and sounds into **Herobrine** and a few cave noises respectively.

> You can:
> 1. Spook your friends!
> 2. Make fake **Herobrine** sightings!
> 3. Or, just have **Herobrine** as your front door, for some reason!
> 
_Inspired by loads of older **Herobrine** door replacement resource packs, now in modern Minecraft able to be installed with the click of a button!_

This resource pack works all the way from 1.10 to the latest release. (So you don't need to worry about the popup!)
